title: chore(deps): update dependency webdriverio to v5.6.4
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| webdriverio | devDependencies | patch | `5.6.2` -> `5.6.4` | [homepage](https://webdriver.io), [source](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio) |
